title: Cuneiform Tablet #0337: Hellenistic Ration List
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a ration list document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a ration list document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. Ration List document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records ration list matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
